title: Exploring AI in Finance, My Journey with a Alpha Stock Investment Center Developer Program
author: Sand4Sale14
selftext:
Hey folks,  
  
I've been diving into the intersection of AI and finance lately and came across a developer program that offers some interesting resources and a community of like minded individuals. It's been a helpful experience so far. If you're into AI applications in finance, it might be worth checking out [Alpha Stock Investment Training Center's Developer Program](https://kingnewswire.com/alpha-stock-investment-training-center-pioneering-an-ai-ecosystem-for-developers-25010122129/)

replies.author: Doubled3615
replies.body: Have you thought about reporting them to the authorities?
